title: PearlEcho
description: A mod that shows you how much time until your ender pearl lands and offers a lot of customization like colors, place on HUD, and more.
body:
### PearlEcho
PearlEcho is a sleek, customizable Minecraft mod that gives you a real-time countdown on your HUD for every ender pearl you throw — with a ton of options to make it fit your style.

Carefully crafted for PvP, speedrunners, and casual players alike, PearlEcho lets you know exactly when your pearl will land, so you can time your clutch escapes, teleports, and combos with confidence.

It’s lightweight, client-side, and designed to feel like a natural part of the game.

# Features
- Ender Pearl Countdown:
  See a live timer on your HUD showing how long until your thrown ender pearl lands.

### Fully Customizable HUD:

- Move the timer anywhere on your screen
- Change text size, color, and background
- Toggle shadow, outline, and background for the timer
- Show/hide the timer in specific situations (only in survival, only when holding a pearl, etc.)
- Configurable Landing Sound:
  - Play a sound when your pearl lands — or turn it off if you prefer.

### Mod Menu Integration:
- Configure everything in-game with a clean, easy-to-use config screen (requires Mod Menu and Cloth Config).

### No Server Required:
- 100% client-side. Works on any server.

### Lightweight:
- No performance impact, no bloat, just the features you want.

# Configuration
You can configure PearlEcho in-game using the Mod Menu (if installed):

1. Open Minecraft and click the “Mods” button (Mod Menu required)

2. Find “PearlEcho” in the list and click “Config”
Tweak everything to your liking!
- Move the timer
- Change colors
- Toggle features
  
3. Save and enjoy!
  
All settings are saved to config/pearlecho.json and persist between sessions.

# Dependencies
Required:

- Fabric API

Optional:

- Mod Menu (for in-game config)
- Cloth Config (for in-game config)
# Who is PearlEcho for?
- PvPers who want perfect pearl timing

- Speedrunners and parkour players

- Anyone who wants a smarter, more informative HUD
  
- Players who love customization and clean UI

# Credits
Frqme – Mod author and developer,
[XtreaMC](https://modrinth.com/user/XtreaMC) – Owner of the [QoLabs Organization](https://modrinth.com/organization/qolabs),

The Minecraft community for ideas and support
